examples: Areas that are naturally at exactly sea-level are always coloured blue regardless, that's why this map of England's fen-land is peppered with blue, even at + 0m: fenland at + 0m.
The paraglider was taking part in an event at the Fenland Wind and Airsports Centre.
Fenland council members had approved plans for a Sainsbury's rejecting an application from Tesco.
It was created as a result of drainage of fenland in the 17th Century.
